description_long: This is a digital wristwatch with a rectangular face and a metallic link band, reminiscent of classic Casio designs. The watch face features a digital LCD display bordered by a thin blue accent, with visible control buttons on the sides for adjusting settings. The band is composed of interlocking metal links, giving it a robust and polished appearance. The display shows time and possibly other functions such as a stopwatch or alarm, as indicated by the segmented digital readout. The side buttons are slightly raised and metallic, designed for tactile feedback. The overall finish is sleek and reflective, with a combination of silver and black tones.
description: A classic digital wristwatch with a rectangular LCD face, metallic link band, and side control buttons. The design is sleek, reflective, and features blue accent details.
description_view_0: The watch is viewed from the side, highlighting the thickness of the face and the metallic band links.
description_view_1: This angled view shows the side profile of the watch face, including two prominent control buttons and the curvature of the band.
description_view_2: The front view displays the digital LCD screen, blue accent border, and the full width of the metallic band.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, showing a single control button and the clasped end of the band.
